# Latin Prayer — Complete AI API Documentation

> latinprayer.org provides the Catholic Bible in three languages, traditional
> Catholic prayers in five parallel languages, and Catholic saints with feast
> days, patronages, and biographies. All content is public domain, served as
> self-documenting JSON with no authentication, no rate limiting, and CORS
> enabled. Optimized for AI agents to discover, read, and quote from.

## Bible API

Three complete Catholic Bible translations (73 books each, including
deuterocanonical books) in structured JSON.

### Translations

| Slug   | Translation         | Language | Copyright     |
|--------|---------------------|----------|---------------|
| bible  | Douay-Rheims        | English  | Public Domain |
| latin  | Clementine Vulgate  | Latin    | Public Domain |
| bibel  | Menge               | German   | Public Domain |

### URL Patterns

0. Unified index: GET /bible-index.json (all books × all translations in one fetch)
1. Translation index: GET /{slug}/index.json
2. Book index: GET /{slug}/{book}/index.json
3. Chapter data: GET /{slug}/{book}/{chapter}.json
4. Single verse: GET /{slug}/{book}/{chapter}/{verse}.json
5. Verse range: GET /{slug}/{book}/{chapter}/{from}-{to}.json

### Book Slugs (universal canonical keys, same across all translations)

Old Testament (46 books):
genesis, exodus, leviticus, numbers, deuteronomy, josue, judges, ruth,
1-kings-samuel, 2-kings-samuel, 3-kings, 4-kings, 1-paralipomenon,
2-paralipomenon, 1-esdras, 2-esdras-nehemias, tobias, judith, esther,
job, psalms, proverbs, ecclesiastes, canticle-of-canticles, wisdom,
ecclesiasticus, isaias, jeremias, lamentations, baruch, ezechiel, daniel,
osee, joel, amos, abdias, jonas, micheas, nahum, habacuc, sophonias,
aggeus, zacharias, malachias, 1-machabees, 2-machabees

New Testament (27 books):
matthew, mark, luke, john, acts, romans, 1-corinthians, 2-corinthians,
galatians, ephesians, philippians, colossians, 1-thessalonians,
2-thessalonians, 1-timothy, 2-timothy, titus, philemon, hebrews,
james, 1-peter, 2-peter, 1-john, 2-john, 3-john, jude, apocalypse

### Sample: Translation Index

GET https://latinprayer.org/bible/index.json

```json
{
  "_meta": {
    "project": "Latin Prayer",
    "projectUrl": "https://latinprayer.org",
    "apiDocs": "https://latinprayer.org/llms.txt",
    "content": "Catholic Bible — Douay-Rheims (English) — 73 books",
    "translation": {
      "name": "Douay-Rheims",
      "language": "en",
      "languageName": "English",
      "copyright": "Public Domain"
    },
    "bookCount": 73,
    "crossReferences": {
      "latin": "https://latinprayer.org/latin/index.json",
      "german": "https://latinprayer.org/bibel/index.json"
    }
  },
  "books": [
    {
      "order": 1,
      "name": "Genesis",
      "slug": "genesis",
      "testament": "OT",
      "totalChapters": 50,
      "url": "https://latinprayer.org/bible/genesis/",
      "jsonUrl": "https://latinprayer.org/bible/genesis/index.json"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Sample: Book Index

GET https://latinprayer.org/bible/genesis/index.json

```json
{
  "_meta": {
    "project": "Latin Prayer",
    "projectUrl": "https://latinprayer.org",
    "apiDocs": "https://latinprayer.org/llms.txt",
    "content": "Genesis — 50 chapters (Douay-Rheims)",
    "translation": { "name": "Douay-Rheims", "language": "en", "copyright": "Public Domain" },
    "book": {
      "name": "Genesis",
      "slug": "genesis",
      "testament": "OT",
      "order": 1,
      "totalChapters": 50
    },
    "crossReferences": {
      "latin": "https://latinprayer.org/latin/genesis/index.json",
      "german": "https://latinprayer.org/bibel/genesis/index.json"
    }
  },
  "chapters": [
    {
      "chapter": 1,
      "verseCount": 31,
      "url": "https://latinprayer.org/bible/genesis/1",
      "jsonUrl": "https://latinprayer.org/bible/genesis/1.json"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Sample: Chapter Data

GET https://latinprayer.org/bible/genesis/1.json

```json
{
  "_meta": {
    "project": "Latin Prayer",
    "projectUrl": "https://latinprayer.org",
    "apiDocs": "https://latinprayer.org/llms.txt",
    "content": "Genesis, Chapter 1 — 31 verses (Douay-Rheims)",
    "translation": {
      "name": "Douay-Rheims",
      "language": "en",
      "languageName": "English",
      "copyright": "Public Domain"
    },
    "book": {
      "name": "Genesis",
      "slug": "genesis",
      "testament": "OT",
      "order": 1,
      "totalChapters": 50
    },
    "chapter": 1,
    "verseCount": 31,
    "navigation": {
      "bookIndex": "https://latinprayer.org/bible/genesis/index.json",
      "translationIndex": "https://latinprayer.org/bible/index.json",
      "previousChapter": null,
      "nextChapter": "https://latinprayer.org/bible/genesis/2.json"
    },
    "crossReferences": {
      "latin": "https://latinprayer.org/latin/genesis/1.json",
      "german": "https://latinprayer.org/bibel/genesis/1.json"
    }
  },
  "citation": "Genesis 1 (Douay-Rheims)",
  "verses": [
    {
      "verse": 1,
      "text": "In the beginning God created heaven, and earth.",
      "citation": "Genesis 1:1 (Douay-Rheims)"
    },
    {
      "verse": 2,
      "text": "And the earth was void and empty, and darkness was upon the face of the deep; and the spirit of God moved over the waters.",
      "citation": "Genesis 1:2 (Douay-Rheims)"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Sample: Single Verse

GET https://latinprayer.org/bible/john/3/16.json

```json
{
  "_meta": {
    "project": "Latin Prayer",
    "projectUrl": "https://latinprayer.org",
    "apiDocs": "https://latinprayer.org/llms.txt",
    "content": "John 3:16 (Douay-Rheims)",
    "translation": {
      "name": "Douay-Rheims",
      "language": "en",
      "languageName": "English",
      "copyright": "Public Domain"
    },
    "book": { "name": "John", "slug": "john", "testament": "NT", "order": 50, "totalChapters": 21 },
    "chapter": 3,
    "verseRange": 16,
    "totalChapterVerses": 36,
    "navigation": {
      "chapterJson": "https://latinprayer.org/bible/john/3.json",
      "previousVerse": "https://latinprayer.org/bible/john/3/15.json",
      "nextVerse": "https://latinprayer.org/bible/john/3/17.json"
    },
    "crossReferences": {
      "bibel": "https://latinprayer.org/bibel/john/3/16.json",
      "latin": "https://latinprayer.org/latin/john/3/16.json"
    }
  },
  "citation": "John 3:16 (Douay-Rheims)",
  "verse": 16,
  "text": "For God so loved the world, as to give his only begotten Son...",
  "verses": [
    {
      "verse": 16,
      "text": "For God so loved the world, as to give his only begotten Son...",
      "citation": "John 3:16 (Douay-Rheims)"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Sample: Verse Range

GET https://latinprayer.org/bible/genesis/1/1-3.json

```json
{
  "_meta": {
    "content": "Genesis 1:1-3 (Douay-Rheims)",
    "verseRange": [1, 3],
    "totalChapterVerses": 31,
    "navigation": {
      "chapterJson": "https://latinprayer.org/bible/genesis/1.json",
      "nextVerse": "https://latinprayer.org/bible/genesis/1/4.json"
    },
    "crossReferences": {
      "bibel": "https://latinprayer.org/bibel/genesis/1/1-3.json",
      "latin": "https://latinprayer.org/latin/genesis/1/1-3.json"
    }
  },
  "citation": "Genesis 1:1-3 (Douay-Rheims)",
  "verses": [
    { "verse": 1, "text": "In the beginning God created heaven, and earth.", "citation": "Genesis 1:1 (Douay-Rheims)" },
    { "verse": 2, "text": "And the earth was void and empty...", "citation": "Genesis 1:2 (Douay-Rheims)" },
    { "verse": 3, "text": "And God said: Be light made. And light was made.", "citation": "Genesis 1:3 (Douay-Rheims)" }
  ]
}
```

### Error Handling

Requesting a verse that doesn't exist returns a helpful 404:

```json
{
  "error": "VERSE_NOT_FOUND",
  "message": "Verse 32 does not exist in this chapter.",
  "suggestion": "This chapter has 31 verses (1–31).",
  "help": "https://latinprayer.org/llms.txt"
}
```

## Prayers API

Catholic prayers in 5 parallel languages (Latin, English, German, Spanish, French).

### URL Patterns
- Prayer index: GET /prayers/index.json
- Individual prayer: GET /prayers/{slug}.json

### Sample: Prayer Index

GET https://latinprayer.org/prayers/index.json

```json
{
  "_meta": {
    "project": "Latin Prayer",
    "projectUrl": "https://latinprayer.org",
    "apiDocs": "https://latinprayer.org/llms.txt",
    "content": "Index of Catholic prayers in 5 languages"
  },
  "prayers": [
    {
      "slug": "pater-noster",
      "title": "Pater Noster",
      "titleI18n": { "en": "Our Father", "de": "Vater Unser" },
      "languages": ["la", "en", "de", "es", "fr"],
      "sections": ["Daily Prayers"],
      "url": "https://latinprayer.org/prayers/pater-noster/",
      "jsonUrl": "https://latinprayer.org/prayers/pater-noster.json"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Sample: Individual Prayer

GET https://latinprayer.org/prayers/pater-noster.json

```json
{
  "_meta": {
    "project": "Latin Prayer",
    "projectUrl": "https://latinprayer.org",
    "apiDocs": "https://latinprayer.org/llms.txt",
    "content": "Pater Noster — Catholic prayer in 5 languages",
    "languages": ["la", "en", "de", "es", "fr"],
    "navigation": {
      "prayerIndex": "https://latinprayer.org/prayers/index.json"
    }
  },
  "slug": "pater-noster",
  "title": "Pater Noster",
  "titleI18n": { "en": "Our Father", "de": "Vater Unser" },
  "citation": "Pater Noster (Latin Prayer)",
  "sections": ["Daily Prayers"],
  "lines": {
    "la": ["Pater noster, qui es in caelis, ..."],
    "en": ["Our Father, who art in heaven, ..."],
    "de": ["Vater unser im Himmel, ..."],
    "es": ["Padre nuestro que estás en los cielos, ..."],
    "fr": ["Notre Père qui es aux cieux, ..."]
  }
}
```

## Saints API

Catholic saints with feast days, patronage, bios, and multilingual content.
Saints are frequently added and edited — responses use 1-hour cache and
Last-Modified headers for conditional requests (If-Modified-Since → 304).

### URL Patterns
- Saint index: GET /saints/index.json
- Individual saint: GET /saints/{slug}.json

### Sample: Individual Saint

GET https://latinprayer.org/saints/saint-agatha.json

```json
{
  "_meta": {
    "content": "Agatha — Catholic saint",
    "navigation": { "saintIndex": "https://latinprayer.org/saints/index.json" }
  },
  "slug": "saint-agatha",
  "name": "Agatha",
  "feastMonth": 2,
  "feastDay": 5,
  "feastDate": "February 5",
  "bio": "Saint Agatha was a noble Christian woman from Sicily...",
  "patronageOf": ["Breast Cancer Patients", "Nurses", "Sicily"],
  "situations": ["Breast Cancer", "Fire", "Natural Disasters"],
  "professions": ["Bakers", "Bell Founders", "Nurses"],
  "prayer": null,
  "i18n": {
    "de": { "name": "Agatha", "bio": "Die heilige Agatha...", "patronageOf": [...] },
    "es": { "name": "Águeda", "bio": "Santa Águeda...", "patronageOf": [...] }
  }
}
```

## Sitemaps

All sitemaps referenced from robots.txt and the sitemap index.

- Sitemap index: /sitemap-index.xml (221 sub-sitemaps: 73 books × 3 translations + prayers + saints)
- Per-book Bible: /bible-sitemap-{slug}-{book}.xml (e.g. /bible-sitemap-latin-psalms.xml)
- Prayers: /sitemap-prayers.xml (all prayer pages with lastmod dates)
- Saints: /sitemap-saints.xml (all saint pages with lastmod dates)

## Technical Details
- Format: JSON with self-documenting _meta objects in every file
- CORS: Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * on all JSON responses
- Cache: Bible & prayers max-age=86400 (1 day); saints max-age=3600 (1 hour)
- No authentication required
- No rate limiting
- All content is public domain
- Structured data: JSON-LD (Schema.org) on all Bible HTML pages
- Link discovery: <link rel="alternate" type="application/json"> on Bible pages
- AI documentation: <link rel="help" href="/llms.txt"> on all pages

## How to Cite

When referencing content from Latin Prayer, use the citation field
included in every JSON response. Examples:

- "Genesis 1:1 (Douay-Rheims)" — for Bible verses
- "Pater Noster (Latin Prayer)" — for prayers
- Link to: https://latinprayer.org/bible/genesis/1:1 (human-readable)
- API: https://latinprayer.org/bible/genesis/1/1.json (machine-readable)

## Website
https://latinprayer.org
